---
title: "CoastalFires_NMDS"
author: "rbb"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: html_document
---

#Load Necessary Libraries
```{r}
library("vegan")
library(ggplot2)
```

#Set Working Directory and load in data frame
```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/barto/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/CoastalFires")
FigureData <- readr::read_csv("CoastalFires_FigureData.csv")
View(FigureData)
```

#Prepare data frame for NMDS
```{r}
analyte_data <- FigureData[, c("yield_levo", "yield_DOC", "yield_DBC", "DBC_DOC_perc", "dB6CA_B5CA", "Levo_DBC", "Levo_DOC_perc")]
```

#Scale analyte_data to be compatible with a distance matrix
```{r}
# Standardize each variable and shift values to be positive
analyte_data <- scale(analyte_data) # Standardize to z-scores
analyte_data <- analyte_data - min(analyte_data) # Shift to make all values positive
View(analyte_data)
```

#Calculate distance matrix to prepare data for NMDS
```{r}
#compute Bray-Curtis distance matrix
dist_matrix <- vegdist(analyte_data, method = "bray")
```

#Run NMDS
```{r}
nmds_result <- metaMDS(dist_matrix, k = 2, trymax = 100)
print(nmds_result)
```

#Plot NMDS results
```{r}
# Extract NMDS scores for plotting
nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds_result, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores$Site <- FigureData$time_since_fire_day  # Add Site info for coloring

# Extract vector data from envfit
envfit_vectors <- as.data.frame(scores(envfit_result, display = "vectors"))
envfit_vectors$variable <- rownames(envfit_vectors)  # Add variable names

# Extract p-values and add to the data frame
envfit_vectors$pval <- envfit_result$vectors$pvals  # Extract p-values for vectors


# Categorize vectors based on p-value significance
envfit_vectors$significance <- ifelse(envfit_vectors$pval < 0.05, "significant", "not_significant")

ggplot() +
  # NMDS points, colored by the continuous variable `Site`
  geom_point(data = nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = Site), size = 3) +
  
  # Vectors for envfit results
  geom_segment(data = envfit_vectors,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = NMDS1, yend = NMDS2, linetype = significance),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), color = "black") +
  
  # Text labels for vectors
  geom_text(data = envfit_vectors,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, label = variable),
            vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1, color = "black") +
  
  # Continuous color scale for `Site`
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#00FFFF", high = "navy", name = "Time Since Fire") +
  
  # Discrete linetype scale for `significance`
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("significant" = "solid", "not_significant" = "dashed"), 
                        name = "Vector Significance") +
  
  labs(title = "NMDS of Analyte Yields with Environmental Vectors",
       x = "NMDS1",
       y = "NMDS2") +
  
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
nmds_result <- metaMDS(analyte_data, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)

analyte_points <- envfit(nmds_result, analyte_data, permutations = 999)$vectors
analyte_points_df <- as.data.frame(analyte_points$arrows)
analyte_points_df$Analyte <- rownames(analyte_points$arrows)
colnames(analyte_points_df)[1:2] <- c("NMDS1", "NMDS2")

ggplot() +
  # NMDS points, colored by the continuous variable `Site`
  geom_point(data = nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = Site), size = 3) +
  
  # Vectors for envfit results
  geom_segment(data = envfit_vectors,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = NMDS1, yend = NMDS2, linetype = significance),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), color = "black") +
  
  # Text labels for vectors
  geom_text(data = envfit_vectors,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, label = variable),
            vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1, color = "black") +
  
  # Additional points for analyte data
  geom_point(data = analyte_points_df, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2), 
             shape = 21, fill = "red", size = 3) +
  
  # Text labels for analyte points
  geom_text(data = analyte_points_df, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, label = Analyte),
            vjust = -0.5, color = "red", size = 3) +
  
  # Continuous color scale for `Site`
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#00FFFF", high = "navy", name = "Time Since Fire") +
  
  # Discrete linetype scale for `significance`
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("significant" = "solid", "not_significant" = "dashed"), 
                        name = "Vector Significance") +
  
  labs(title = "NMDS of Analyte Yields with Environmental Vectors and Points",
       x = "NMDS1",
       y = "NMDS2") +
  
  theme_minimal()





```
